creator: ipse@martinmoeller.net
text:
I'm the "happy" owner of a Cherry G247 wireless kbd/mouse combination.
The receiver is connected to the USB port. Both, keyboard and mouse, are
recognized during boot:

ukbd0: <Cherry Wireless Keyboard and Mouse, class 0/0, rev 1.10/1.00, addr 2> on uhub0
kbd2 at ukbd0
ums0: <Cherry Wireless Keyboard and Mouse, class 0/0, rev 1.10/1.00, addr 2> on uhub0
ums0: 5 buttons and Z dir.

The mouse is refusing any action, the keyboard works fine. Any attempt to
access the mouse, delivers a "device in use" error. Neither X nor moused
does anything useful with it. Connecting an additional mouse to another
usb port works.
